name: 當場下跪求婚/求原諒
description: 霸道總裁放下所有驕傲當場下跪，極致的反差萌——最有權力的人做出最卑微的姿態，因為愛。
tags: 高大威嚴的男主突然跪地，權力關係瞬間反轉的視覺衝擊

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Otherwise, I'll kneel here and not get up. As long as you don't forgive me for a day, I'll kneel for a day. If you won't forgive me for a year, I'll kneel for a year. / You dummy. Who told you to kneel that long? Don't wear out our floors.
examples.context: 高大威嚴的男主突然跪地，權力關係瞬間反轉的視覺衝擊
